expected_improvement: Establish the post-party venue, wristband, and reader in one coherent cinematic plate.
actual_result: Environment mood passed. Foreground object read as a glow stick rather than a wristband and the gate was too soft to carry the metaphor.
reviewer_decision: Retain as environment plate; build the wristband, reader, and scanner ring deterministically. No paid retry.

expected_improvement: Prove Nina, one permission wristband, party exit, and delayed door unlock can hold in one continuous shot.
actual_result: Actor, location, and camera motion passed. The model placed a glowing wristband on both wrists and the door began open, so the prop continuity and delayed-unlock cause-and-effect failed.
reviewer_decision: Reject. Hold the remaining 63 approved credits. Do not submit the morning or resolution tests until Gabe approves a corrected party retry.
